title.en: Copper-bearing contraceptive intrauterine devices - Requirements and tests
title.zh: 含铜宫内节育器 - 要求和试验

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and tests for single-use, copper-bearing contraceptive intrauterine devices (IUDs) and their insertion instruments. Edition 5.
standards.scope: Copper-bearing contraceptive IUDs and insertion instruments.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-41: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of surgical luminaires and luminaires for diagnosis
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-41部分：手术灯和诊断灯的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.abstract: Applies to the basic safety and essential performance of surgical luminaires and luminaires for diagnosis. Edition 2.
standards.scope: Surgical and diagnostic luminaires used in gynecological and urological examinations.

title.en: Mechanical contraceptives - Reusable natural rubber latex diaphragms - Requirements and tests
title.zh: 机械避孕器具 - 可重复使用天然橡胶乳胶隔膜 - 要求和试验

standards.abstract: Specifies the minimum requirements and test methods to be used for reusable natural rubber latex vaginal diaphragms. Confirmed in 2020.
standards.scope: Reusable natural rubber latex vaginal diaphragms for contraception.

title.en: Female condoms - Requirements and test methods
title.zh: 女用安全套 - 要求和试验方法

standards.abstract: Specifies minimum requirements and test methods for single-use female condoms made of synthetic and natural rubber latex. Edition 2, confirmed in 2023.
standards.scope: Female condoms (natural rubber latex and synthetic materials).

title.en: Male condoms - Requirements and test methods for condoms to be used with condom-compatible lubricants
title.zh: 男用安全套 - 与避孕套兼容润滑剂配合使用的避孕套的要求和试验方法

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for male condoms to be used with condom-compatible lubricants. Confirmed in 2020.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-25: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of electrocardiographs
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-25部分：心电图仪的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.abstract: Applies to the basic safety and essential performance of electrocardiographs intended for use in diagnosis and monitoring. Edition 2.
standards.scope: Electrocardiograph equipment for cardiac diagnosis and monitoring.
standards.note: Also applicable to urodynamic monitoring equipment that incorporates ECG functionality.
